name: Tangy Barbecue Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1 boneless chuck roast (3 to 4 pounds), trimmed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a slow cooker, combine the first 12 ingredients; mix well.
2. Add the roast.
3. Cover and cook on high for 6-7 hours or until tender.
4. Remove the roast; let it cool.
5. Shred the meat and return it to the sauce.
6. Heat through.
7. Serve on buns.
Yield: 14-18 servings.
